_provenance.note: Library priors for the full-proof set-cover decomposition (Epic F). Shares functor + entity vocabulary with grounding/dgroups/q1_full_proof.json so each theorem's statement appears verbatim as a sub-structure of the proof. Separate from theorems.json (Epic E) which uses a different functor granularity. Grounded; checked by grounding.verify.

strong_convexity.name: strong_convexity
strong_convexity.text: For a gamma-strongly convex function, the distance between two points is bounded by the gradient difference: gamma ||x - y|| <= ||grad f(x) - grad f(y)||.

kantorovich_rubinstein.name: kantorovich_rubinstein
kantorovich_rubinstein.text: For a beta-Lipschitz function, the difference of its expectations under two distributions is bounded by beta times the Wasserstein-1 distance: ||E_P f - E_Q f|| <= beta W1(P, Q).

banach_fixed_point.name: banach_fixed_point
banach_fixed_point.text: A contraction map T with modulus kappa < 1 has a unique fixed point theta_star, and its iterates converge to theta_star at a linear rate kappa^t.
